title: lithocarpus kochummenii
intro: Lithocarpus kochummenii, also known as the Borneo Lithocarpus, is a species of evergreen tree native to the island of Borneo in Southeast Asia. This tree is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are derived from its bark and leaves. The health benefits of Lithocarpus kochummenii include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion by traditional healers in the region, who use it to make teas, tinctures, and other herbal remedies.
